SearchOperations_searchMessages.usage:
params := SearchMessagesParams{
	Query: "example",
	ChatIDs: []int32{int32(123)},
	UserIDs: []int32{int32(123)},
	CreatedFrom: Ptr("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
	CreatedTo: Ptr("2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"),
	Sort: Ptr(SearchSortRelevance),
	Limit: Ptr(int32(123)),
	Cursor: Ptr("example"),

response, err := client.Search.SearchMessages(ctx, params)
